fields.title: Capture Ralph execution contract at loop start
fields.description: Starting a Ralph loop should pin the complete Tau-owned execution contract for future controller and child sessions. The loop should not later infer its tools or agent availability from the active Pi session unless the user explicitly starts a new loop.
fields.design: During /ralph start, capture the current ExecutionProfile, sandbox profile, active tool names via pi.getActiveTools(), available tool metadata via pi.getAllTools(), and enabled agents from the resolved AgentRegistry plus current non-Ralph project/session agent selection. Persist this as the Ralph capability contract in .pi/loops/state/<task-id>.json. Treat resume as using the pinned contract rather than refreshing from ambient state. Include a clear error path for missing active tools or unknown enabled agents.
fields.acceptance_criteria: New Ralph loop state includes a pinned execution profile, sandbox profile, active tool policy, and enabled agent list; /ralph resume does not silently refresh the contract from ambient Pi state; tests prove that changing Pi active tools after start does not change the persisted Ralph contract.
